DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Approve one exact destructive column drop in the form schema.table.column.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Approve one exact destructive table drop in the form schema.table.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Approve one exact destructive column truncation in the form schema.table.column.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Directory where the deploy manifest workspace will be written.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source MetaSql workspace to compare with the live database.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Deploy manifest workspace created by deploy-plan.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Source MetaSql workspace used to create the manifest.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Execute SQL from a file. Mutually exclusive with --query.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Execute inline SQL. Mutually exclusive with --file.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Command timeout for each SQL batch. 0 or omitted means no timeout.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Replace one SQLCMD-style $(NAME) token before execution.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Create an empty database/schema workspace when no tables or modules match.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Environment variable containing the SQL Server connection string.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract function modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract stored procedure modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract tables, columns, keys, and indexes. If no include switch is provided, all object kinds are extracted.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract view modules. If any include switch is provided, only selected object kinds are extracted.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Directory where the MetaSql workspace will be created.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract only one SQL Server schema.

DocumentationFact.Name: Description
DocumentationFact.Value: Extract only one table. SQL module extraction is skipped when a table filter is used.
